name: libfont-afm-perl
title: libfont-afm-perl
summary: Perl interface to Adobe Font Metrics files
description:
Perl interface to Adobe Font Metrics files
This module implements the Font::AFM class. Objects of this class are
initialised from an AFM-file and allow you to obtain information
about the font and the metrics of the various glyphs in the font.
.
All measurements in AFM files are given in terms of units equal to
1/1000 of the scale factor of the font being used. To compute actual
sizes in a document, these amounts should be multiplied by (scale
factor of font)/1000.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfont-afm-perl because Perl interface to Adobe Font Metrics files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfont-afm-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfont-afm-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfont-afm-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
